title: Repository Structure — Structured Projection
description: This is the structured JSON projection of the repository structure summary. It is not the on-disk .slopbrick/structure.md file: that Markdown artifact is a derived human- and agent-readable rendering of inventory.json and constitution.json. Producers that emit the JSON projection MUST satisfy this schema; consumers of structure.md MUST treat the Markdown headings and body as a presentation format rather than validating the Markdown as JSON.

frontmatter.description: Metadata in the structured JSON projection. The derived structure.md renderer may present these values as Markdown/YAML frontmatter, but structure.md itself is not schema input.

inventoryVersion.description: Schema version of the inventory this memory.md was rendered from.

constitutionVersion.description: Schema version of the constitution this memory.md was rendered from.

sections.description: Ordered sections in the structured JSON projection. A Markdown renderer may map these section IDs to headings; readers of structure.md MUST tolerate presentation-only wording changes.

body.description: Free-form markdown body. Renderers should use bullet lists for pattern/component listings.
